base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tractor_beam_nes — a effect_layer from 1981 galaga. Tractor beam — NES palette rendition. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Tractor beam — NES palette rendition; 4-frame expand loop; functionally identical mechanic to arcade
